---
title: "Marin Girard"
title-block: false
---

::: {.home-hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
<div class="eyebrow">Quantum foundations · Quantum information · Emergence . Quantum Error correction</div>

::: {.hero-intro}
I like quantum stuff.
:::

I am a PhD student in physics at Virginia Tech working on quantum foundations, quantum error correction and the emergence of space from quantum.

This site is about my current research directions, selected papers, and CV.

::: {.trust-links}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=8xDZ2dcAAAAJ&hl=en) · [mcgirard AT vt.edu](mailto:)
:::
:::

![](assets/profile-photo.jpg){.hero-photo}
:::
